blocks.body: Two-step equations require two operations to solve. Order: first undo addition/subtraction, then undo multiplication/division. Example: 2x - 3 = 11. Step 1: add 3 -> 2x = 14. Step 2: divide by 2 -> x = 7.

blocks.label: Example 1
blocks.body: 5x + 4 = 29. Subtract 4: 5x = 25. Divide by 5: x = 5. Check: 5(5) + 4 = 29. True.
Steps: (1) Distribute if needed. (2) Combine like terms on each side. (3) Move variable terms to one side. (4) Isolate the variable.
Always check your answer by substituting it back into the ORIGINAL equation (not a simplified version), to catch any errors made during solving.
